mapper.select: SELECT FAV_ID, CO_ID, USR_ID, PGM_CD, CRE_DT, UPD_DT FROM ADM_FAVORITE WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND USR_ID = #{usrId} ORDER BY CRE_DT DESC
SELECT FAV_ID, CO_ID, USR_ID, PGM_CD, CRE_DT, UPD_DT FROM ADM_FAVORITE WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND USR_ID = #{usrId} AND PGM_CD = #{pgmCd} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADM_FAVORITE ( CO_ID, USR_ID, PGM_CD, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{usrId}, #{pgmCd}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
